name: Cabbage and Bacon (Irish)
recipeIngredient: Large Savoy cabbage or 2 small Savoy cabbages
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cabbage in half and boil for 15 minutes in salted water.
2. Drain, then soak in cold water for 1 minute, then drain well.
3. Slice the cabbage.
4. Line the bottom of a casserole with half the bacon strips.
5. Put the cabbage on top and add the seasonings (salt and pepper).
6. Add enough stock to barely cover the ingredients.
7. Place the remaining bacon strips on top.
8. Cover and simmer for an hour, until most of the liquid is absorbed.
